'''wanudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachmark|coachmark]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachmark|coachmark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wanudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wænidith|wænidith]] || [[word:wænidij|wænidij]] || [[word:wænidish|wænidish]] || [[word:wænidi|wænidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanunuduth|wanunuduth]] || [[word:wanunuduj|wanunuduj]] || [[word:wanunudush|wanunudush]] || [[word:wanunudu|wanunudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanuduth|wanuduth]] || [[word:wanuduj|wanuduj]] || [[word:wanudush|wanudush]] || [[word:wanudu|wanudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanufduth|wanufduth]] || [[word:wanufduj|wanufduj]] || [[word:wanufdush|wanufdush]] || [[word:wanufduf|wanufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanuduthu|wanuduthu]] || [[word:wanuduju|wanuduju]] || [[word:wanudushu|wanudushu]] || [[word:wanuduku|wanuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanuduth|wanuduth]] || [[word:wanuduj|wanuduj]] || [[word:wanudush|wanudush]] || [[word:wanudu|wanudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanuduthul|wanuduthul]] || [[word:wanudujul|wanudujul]] || [[word:wanudushul|wanudushul]] || [[word:wanudukul|wanudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanuduthuthu|wanuduthuthu]] || [[word:wanudujuju|wanudujuju]] || [[word:wanudushushu|wanudushushu]] || [[word:wanuduku|wanuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanuduthun|wanuduthun]] || [[word:wanudujun|wanudujun]] || [[word:wanudushun|wanudushun]] || [[word:wanudukun|wanudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanuduthuoro|wanuduthuoro]] || [[word:wanudujuoro|wanudujuoro]] || [[word:wanudushuoro|wanudushuoro]] || [[word:wanudukuoro|wanudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
